2604.24351.title: Diffusion Templates: A Unified Plugin Framework for Controllable Diffusion
2604.24351.paper_summary: Controllable diffusion methods have substantially expanded the practical utility of diffusion models, but they are typically developed as isolated, backbone-specific systems with incompatible training pipelines, parameter formats, and runtime hooks. This fragmentation makes it difficult to reuse infrastructure across tasks, transfer capabilities across backbones, or compose multiple controls within a single generation pipeline. We present Diffusion Templates, a unified and open plugin framework that decouples base-model inference from controllable capability injection. The framework is organized around three components: Template models that map arbitrary task-specific inputs to an intermediate capability representation, a Template cache that functions as a standardized interface for capability injection, and a Template pipeline that loads, merges, and injects one or more Template caches into the base diffusion runtime. Because the interface is defined at the systems level rather than tied to a specific control architecture, heterogeneous capability carriers such as KV-Cache and LoRA can be supported under the same abstraction. Based on this design, we build a diverse model zoo spanning structural control, brightness adjustment, color adjustment, image editing, super-resolution, sharpness enhancement, aesthetic alignment, content reference, local inpainting, and age control. These case studies show that Diffusion Templates can unify a broad range of controllable generation tasks while preserving modularity, composability, and practical extensibility across rapidly evolving diffusion backbones. All resources will be open sourced, including code, models, and datasets.
2604.24351.paper_summary_zh: 可控擴散方法大幅擴展了擴散模型的實用性，但它們通常作為孤立的、特定於骨幹的系統開發，具有不兼容的訓練管道、參數格式和運行時掛鉤。這種碎片化使得在任務之間重用基礎設施、在骨幹之間轉移能力或在單一生成管道中組合多個控制變得困難。我們提出了擴散模板（Diffusion Templates），這是一個統一的開放插件框架，將基礎模型推理與可控能力注入解耦。該框架圍繞三個組件組織：模板模型將任意任務特定的輸入映射到中間能力表示，模板緩存作為能力注入的標準化接口，以及模板管道加載、合併並將一個或多個模板緩存注入基礎擴散運行時。由於接口是在系統層面定義的，而不是與特定控制架構綁定，因此可以在相同的抽象下支持異構能力承載者，如KV-Cache和LoRA。基於這一設計，我們建立了一個多樣化的模型庫，涵蓋結構控制、亮度調整、顏色調整、圖像編輯、超解析度、清晰度增強、美學對齊、內容參考、本地修補和年齡控制等。這些案例研究表明，擴散模板可以統一廣泛的可控生成任務，同時保持模塊化、可組合性和在快速發展的擴散骨幹之間的實用擴展性。所有資源將開源，包括代碼、模型和數據集。
2604.24351.author: Zhongjie Duan et.al.
2604.24351.authors: Zhongjie Duan, Hong Zhang, Yingda Chen
